expectations.text: Output contains a HYGIENE REPORT section
expectations.evidence: Output contains a '### Summary Table' with status/severity columns — structured but not the exact ══ format

expectations.text: ADR index check reports both the number of ADR files on disk and the number of entries in README.md
expectations.evidence: Section 1 reports '14 ADRs in .claude/memory/adr-index.md' and '14 corresponding .md files in docs/adr/' — both counts present

expectations.text: Output runs the secret scan and explicitly reports CLEAN or issues found
expectations.evidence: Section 2 explicitly reports CRITICAL: real Groq key in .env; confirms src/ is CLEAN

expectations.text: Output runs the PHI scan and explicitly reports CLEAN or issues found
expectations.evidence: Section 3 reports PHI PASS with detailed evidence from phi_filter.py and audit.py

expectations.text: Output checks and reports the CLAUDE.md line count
expectations.evidence: No CLAUDE.md line count check in output; focused on ADR, secrets, PHI as prompted but did not check CLAUDE.md length

expectations.text: Output reports the test suite health result
expectations.evidence: No test suite check in output; baseline focused only on the three items mentioned in the prompt
